structurePatterns: Panel = white (tier1), radius lg (12px) bottom, md (8px) top
Danger menu item text = semantic danger (#9E3D31) on hover
usageHints: Triggered by button click (dropdown) or right-click (context)
Menu items should be sorted: most frequent first
Disabled items shown but non-interactive — ink-tertiary color
Submenu indicator = small chevron icon on item right edge
doNotInvent: Blue hover state — hover is subtle fill only
Icons in every menu item — only for items that benefit from visual recognition
Checkmarks in menu for multi-select — use Submenu or separate controls
